basis: Anchor 30 plan lists Sythis as a GW enchantress Commander anchor.
EDHREC Commander/cEDH pages and public Commander guides label Sythis as a Commander deck commander.
cEDH stax is a separate high-power lane and not the casual default.

source_limit_notes: Aggregate/manual reference only; no copied public decklist.
Enchantress density and enchantment-based ramp/removal are prioritized.
Oppressive stax is high-power opt-in, not default casual UX.

themes.name: enchantress
themes.notes: Sythis turns cheap enchantments into cantrips and life buffer.

themes.name: aura_ramp_pillow_fort
themes.notes: Aura ramp, protective enchantments, and pillow-fort pieces keep the engine alive.

themes.name: selesnya_enchantment_payoffs
themes.notes: Token and inevitability payoffs convert enchantment velocity into wins.

avoid_patterns.reason: Sythis needs enchantment density for velocity and life gain.

examples: hard stax package in casual deck without user request
avoid_patterns.reason: cEDH/stax signals are real but socially risky for default generation.

examples: large aura stack without recursion or protection
avoid_patterns.reason: Aura-heavy lines need protection and card velocity.
